status_line: Monday 8:40 AM ET / 12:40 PM UTC — ninth hour of the morning, and the day's headline is GUARDIAN. After 54 consecutive missed cycles, GUARDIAN ran at 11:28 UTC and produced the first agent artifact in this sweep tree's history: a 26 KB three-document voice audit covering the Sharpie Gallery one-sheet v2, gold package, and board deliberation. The Gallery One-Sheet V2 came back at 9.2/10 — a new top score, beating MAESTRO's platform bible (9.0/10) — with 'The ink doesn't know if it's a coffee cup or a masterpiece' called out as Steve Jobs register. Two YELLOW non-blocking flags only ('Award-trajectory' and 'Directional Year 1 investment'). Gold Package and Board Deliberation scores in the body of the audit. SARAH Run 120 at 12:06 UTC caught the GUARDIAN write and surfaced it as new Open Item #11 — with the naming-convention gap also flagged because GUARDIAN isn't yet in SKILL.md's enumerated agents (SCOUT/MAESTRO/NOLAN/TESTING/draft-mode). Tray now 11. Output tree flat at 1,058 files. Fourth consecutive Downloads-blocked sweep — ~/Downloads-as-Cowork-directory recommendation continues to carry. SCOUT's earlier Apollo enrichment at 11:07 UTC remains the morning's other big delivery: 9 verified EP/HoP emails pushed to the Google Sheet (Sanctuary Content/Doomsday/Curious/Spy/Exit/Good Oil/Velocity/Romance/Egg Films), 5 shops not resolvable in Apollo, ~31/60 credits used MTD. No new MAESTRO/WRITER output since 02:46 UTC. Lands' End now T-3 days.
